text_original: can you let us chat more longer with out time
text_zh: 你能让我们聊天更久一点吗
reply_original: Hi there! Thank you for your feedback. We understand you'd like longer chat sessions, and we're actively exploring ways to improve this. Currently, VIP members enjoy unlimited chats - you might want to check out the subscription options. If you'd like to share more suggestions, please email us at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 你好！感谢你的反馈。我们理解你希望延长聊天时长，目前正在积极研究改进方案。VIP会员可享受无限畅聊，你可以考虑订阅相关服务。如有更多建议，欢迎发送邮件至support@fantachat.ai与我们分享。
